pkgmetadata.longdescription: iCalEventsSimple Python 3 library to download, parse and query iCal sources.[[PyPI version](httpsbadge.fury.iopyicalevnt.svg)](httpsbadge.fury.iopyicalevnt)[[Jazzband](httpsjazzband.costaticimgbadge.svg)](httpsjazzband.co) Build infolast push [run pytest](httpsgithub.comjazzbandicaleventsactionsworkflowspython-test.ymlbadge.svg)master [[Run pytest](httpsgithub.comjazzbandicaleventsactionsworkflowspython-test.ymlbadge.svgbranchmaster)](httpsgithub.comjazzbandicaleventsactionsworkflowspython-test.yml) Documentationhttpsicalevents.readthedocs.ioenlatest Usage iCloudpythonfrom icalevents.icalevents import eventses events(iCloud URL, fix_appleTrue) Googlepythonfrom icalevents.icalevents import eventses events(Google Calendar URL) ContributingYou will need [poetry](httpsgithub.compython-poetrypoetry) and [pre-commit](httpspre-commit.comindex.html) installed and than run.bashpre-commit installHappy contributing
